mapper.select: SELECT id, provider_id, model_name, capabilities, verified, create_time, ext_params FROM ai_models ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, provider_id, model_name, capabilities, verified, create_time, ext_params FROM ai_models WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_models (provider_id, model_name, capabilities, verified, ext_params) VALUES (#{providerId}, #{modelName}, #{capabilities}, #{verified}, #{extParams})
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_models SET provider_id = #{providerId}, model_name = #{modelName}, capabilities = #{capabilities}, verified = #{verified}, ext_params = #{extParams} WHERE id = #{id}
